name: Char Fulmen
description: Tank principal de l'Hégémonie au profil en diamant agressif. Canon railgun coaxial et tourelle octogonale. Blindage réactif cramoisie. La pointe de flèche mécanique qui perce les lignes ennemies.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Aggressive diamond-shaped main battle tank with octagonal turret, railgun cannon, wedge hull design, plowing through ruined terrain.
